'''Soullex''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Fardon system]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. After the [[Battle of Tantive V]], it was [[Garrison/Legends|garrisoned]] as the headquarters of [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Gaen Drommel]]. Drommel was betrayed and killed by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Gastos Niovi|Niovi]], who surrendered the [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']] to the New Republic.
